name: Curried Crab Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Bake the pie shell for 10 minutes.
2. Remove the baked pie shell from the oven and let it cool slightly.
3. Drain the crab meat thoroughly, then combine with lemon juice, sherry, chopped onions, curry powder, and parsley in a bowl. Refrigerate for 1-2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
4. Place cubed Swiss cheese on the bottom of the pastry shell.
5. Spread the cooked crab mixture over the cheese.
6. Beat together eggs, milk, sour cream, and salt until well combined.
7. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the quiche filling.
8. Bake in the preheated oven at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 45 minutes or until lightly browned and set.
9. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into wedges. Serves 6.
Serves: 24
